name: Cost Efficiency Validation
question: Is the network spending energy and OpEx on capacity that is actually being used and delivered?
ifAbsent: Energy optimisation actions are applied without subscriber impact validation. Cell sleeping may degrade coverage in occupied areas. CapEx planning rests on traffic models that are not ground-truth verified.
atL4: Energy and cost optimisation decisions are validated in real time against delivered quality. Autonomous cell sleeping, carrier aggregation adjustments, and RAN sharing decisions are constrained by continuous F6 feedback.
